name: ai-profit-os-mobile
description: AI Profit OS mobile clients for H5, WeChat Mini Program and native App

scripts.build:mp-weixin: cross-env UNI_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/build/mp-weixin uni build -p mp-weixin --mode production
scripts.build:mp-weixin:candidate: cross-env UNI_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/candidate/mp-weixin uni build -p mp-weixin --mode production
scripts.build:app:android: cross-env MOBILE_TARGET_OS=android UNI_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/candidate/android uni build -p app-plus --mode production
scripts.build:app:ios: cross-env MOBILE_TARGET_OS=ios UNI_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/candidate/ios uni build -p app-plus --mode production
scripts.build:all: npm run build:h5 && npm run build:mp-weixin && npm run build:app:android && npm run build:app:ios
scripts.verify: npm run check:permissions && npm run type-check && npm run build:mp-weixin
